creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=6b6c2f9f597039083465d17cb34259e170db76b1

commit 6b6c2f9f597039083465d17cb34259e170db76b1
Author:     Jan Beich <jbeich@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-04-06 21:18:24 +0000
Commit:     Jan Beich <jbeich@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-04-07 00:39:10 +0000

    devel/icu: temporarily switch to GitHub

    - Release downloads are published way later
    - LFS mainly affected ICU4J (Java API) while this port builds ICU4C (C/C++ API)
    - docs/processes/release/tasks/publish/index.md says LFS is nowadays supported by GitHub archives

    PR:             262654

 devel/icu/Makefile | 10 +++++-----
 devel/icu/distinfo |  4 ++--
 2 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)
